translations.## iOS、Android、Flutter 職缺通知使用小技巧\n\n: ## Tips for Using iOS, Android, Flutter Job Notifications
translations.## 一鍵訂閱：三個專屬 Channel 直接加入\n\n: ## One-Click Subscription: Join Three Dedicated Channels Directly
translations.## 加入與使用指南（iOS / Android / Desktop 都適用）\: ## How to Join and Use (Applicable for iOS / Android / Desktop)
translations.## 如何把通知變成「可行動」：從看到到投遞的最佳路徑\n\n: ## How to Make Notifications "Actionable": The Best Path from Viewing to Applying
translations.## 每日訊息長什麼樣？(通知範例)\n\n: ## What Does the Daily Message Look Like? (Notification Example)
translations.## 為什麼行動開發者需要這個 Telegram 職缺通知？\n\n: ## Why Do Mobile Developers Need This Telegram Job Notification?
translations.### iOS/Android/Flutter 每日自動職缺通知(Telegra: ### iOS/Android/Flutter Daily Auto Job Notifications (Telegram Public Free Channel), Helping You Catch the Latest Job Opportunities
translations.**Step 1：快速掃過標題**：判斷地區與平台是否符合你的求職策略（如: 可: **Step 1: Quickly scan the titles**: Determine if the location and platform match your job search strategy (e.g., remote work available).
translations.**Step 2：優先處理高薪或 🆕**：先點開薪資高或 🆕 標記的職缺，確保搶: **Step 2: Prioritize High Salary or 🆕**: First open job listings marked with high salary or 🆕 to ensure early application.
translations.**Step 3：用模板投遞**：準備 iOS/Android/Flutter: **Step 3: Apply Using Templates**: Prepare three resume templates for iOS/Android/Flutter, and adjust technical keywords based on job requirements.
translations.**Step 4：紀錄與追蹤**：在自己的 Notion/表格寫下公司、職稱、薪: **Step 4: Record and Track**: Write down the company, job title, salary, application date, and response status in your Notion or spreadsheet.
translations.**善用 Telegram 搜尋**：在 Channel 內用關鍵字搜尋，快速找: **Make Good Use of Telegram Search**: Use keywords to search within the Channel and quickly find posts with specific criteria.
translations.**想回報問題或建議？** 直接在 [問題回報 Channel](https:/: **Want to report an issue or suggestion?** Leave a message directly in the [Feedback Channel](https://t.me/feedbackforjobstw){:target="_blank"}; please include the job link and screenshots before messaging to help with troubleshooting.
translations.**排序邏輯**：依「職缺新到舊、薪水高到低、內容包含職務關鍵字」排列，方便先看: **Sorting Logic**: Sorted by "newest to oldest job postings, highest to lowest salary, and inclusion of job-related keywords," making it easy to view the latest and best-paid options first.
translations.**推播時段**：每天 **00:00–01:00** 之間發布(各頻道時間不一: **Push Notification Time**: Sent daily between **00:00–01:00** (times vary by channel), messages are kept for **30 days** only.
translations.**時間固定、清爽好讀**：每日 00:00–01:00 投遞，早上起床滑過就能: **Fixed Time, Clean and Easy to Read**: Delivered daily between 00:00–01:00, so you can catch up as soon as you wake up; message spacing and sorting are optimized for mobile reading.
translations.**用關鍵字確認職缺方向**：點進原站時，搜尋 SwiftUI/Swift、Ko: **Use Keywords to Confirm Job Direction**: When visiting the original site, search for keywords like SwiftUI/Swift, Kotlin/Jetpack Compose, Flutter/BLoC/Riverpod to determine if the job matches your tech stack.
translations.**篩選條件**：職缺在 **YYYY-MM-DD** 新增或更新內容，且「職務: **Filter Criteria**: Jobs added or updated on **YYYY-MM-DD**, with "Job category as iOS/Android/Flutter Engineer" or "Job description containing iOS/Android/Flutter keywords."
translations.**薪資排序優先看**：已按薪資高到低排列，先挑前三則研究，公司對技術的投資通常: **Salary Sorting Priority**: Sorted from highest to lowest salary. Focus on the top three listings first, as a company's investment in technology usually reflects in its pay.
translations.**行動版體驗友好**：Telegram 本身推播穩定，iOS 與 Androi: **Mobile-friendly experience**: Telegram's push notifications are reliable, available on both iOS and Android; you can also sync and view on the desktop version of Telegram.
translations.**訊息為什麼只有 30 天？** 減少舊職缺干擾、保護企業職缺資訊。\n: **Why are messages only kept for 30 days?** To reduce interference from old job postings and protect company job information.
translations.**記錄已投遞名單**：把已投遞的連結加上 ✅ 標記或收藏，避免重複送件，也方便: **Record Submitted Applications**: Mark submitted links with a ✅ or save them to avoid duplicate applications and to easily track responses later.
translations.**資訊可信嗎？** 職缺描述與薪資以原刊登網站為準，本服務不保證無缺漏或完全正: **Is the information reliable?** Job descriptions and salaries are based on the original posting sites. This service does not guarantee completeness or accuracy; please verify on the original site before applying.
translations.**跨平台整合**：一次收齊 [104 人力銀行](https://www.10: **Cross-Platform Integration**: Collect iOS, Android, and Flutter job openings from [104 Job Bank](https://www.104.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [1111 Job Bank](https://www.1111.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [Cake (CakeResume)](https://www.cake.me/jobs){:target="_blank"}, [LinkedIn Jobs](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/){:target="_blank"}, and [Yourator](https://www.yourator.co/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.**週期檢查 🆕**：先鎖定 🆕 標記，加速投遞。\n: **Periodic Check 🆕**: Focus on 🆕 tags first to speed up your application.
translations.**🆕 標記**：近 **90 天** 新出現的職缺會標上 🆕，沒有薪資資訊代表: **🆕 Tag**: Jobs posted within the last **90 days** are marked with 🆕. No salary info means it is negotiable or not disclosed on the original site.
translations.- **Focus on iOS/Android/Flutter Job Ope:
- **Focus on iOS/Android/Flutter Job Openings**

- **Fixed Time, Clean and Easy to Read**: Delivered daily between 00:00–01:00, so you can catch up as soon as you wake up; message spacing and sorting are optimized for mobile reading.

- **Cross-Platform Integration**: Collect iOS, Android, and Flutter job openings from [104 Job Bank](https://www.104.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [1111 Job Bank](https://www.1111.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [Cake (CakeResume)](https://www.cake.me/jobs){:target="_blank"}, [LinkedIn Jobs](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/){:target="_blank"}, and [Yourator](https://www.yourator.co/){:target="_blank"}.

- **Mobile-friendly experience**: Telegram's push notifications are reliable, available on both iOS and Android; you can also sync and view on the desktop version of Telegram.
translations.- **Salary Sorting Priority**: Sorted fr:
- **Salary Sorting Priority**: Sorted from highest to lowest salary. Focus on the top three listings first, as a company's investment in technology usually reflects in its pay.

- **Use Keywords to Confirm Job Direction**: When visiting the original site, search for keywords like SwiftUI/Swift, Kotlin/Jetpack Compose, Flutter/BLoC/Riverpod to determine if the job matches your tech stack.

- **Record Submitted Applications**: Mark submitted links with a ✅ or save them to avoid duplicate applications and to easily track responses later.

- **Periodic Check 🆕**: Focus on 🆕 tags first to speed up your application.

- **Make Good Use of Telegram Search**: Use keywords to search within the Channel and quickly find posts with specific criteria.
translations.- **Step 1: Quickly scan the titles**: D:
- **Step 1: Quickly scan the titles**: Determine if the location and platform match your job search strategy (e.g., remote work available).

- **Step 2: Prioritize High Salary or 🆕**: First open job listings marked with high salary or 🆕 to ensure early application.

- **Step 3: Apply Using Templates**: Prepare three resume templates for iOS/Android/Flutter, and adjust technical keywords based on job requirements.

- **Step 4: Record and Track**: Write down the company, job title, salary, application date, and response status in your Notion or spreadsheet.
translations.- **Why are messages only kept for 30 da:
- **Why are messages only kept for 30 days?** To minimize clutter from outdated job posts and protect company job details.

- **Is the information reliable?** Job descriptions and salaries come from the original posting sites. This service does not guarantee completeness or accuracy; please verify on the original site before applying.

- **Want to report an issue or suggestion?** Leave a message directly in the [Feedback Channel](https://t.me/feedbackforjobstw){:target="_blank"}; please include the job link and screenshots before messaging to help with troubleshooting.
translations.- The title includes the date, region, a:
- The title includes the date, region, and number of platforms to help you quickly determine if there is a big surge of iOS/Android/Flutter job openings today.

- Each listing includes the platform, company, job title, and salary range. Click the original link to see the full description.

- 🆕 indicates the job was posted within the last 90 days and is recommended for priority application; a blank salary means it is not disclosed or negotiable on the original site.
translations.- This service is for non-profit use onl:
- This service is for non-profit use only. All job content copyrights belong to the original posting websites.

- ⚠️⚠️⚠️ **No job postings or advertisements accepted. Please do not message for placement requests; this service will never charge fees or receive any commercial benefits.**

- Job-related information is based on the original website announcements and is not guaranteed to be complete or accurate.

- If you are an employer, please post or update job openings directly on the job platforms.
translations.- [@iosjobstw](https://t.me/iosjobstw){::
- [@iosjobstw](https://t.me/iosjobstw){:target="_blank"}: Dedicated to iOS job openings and iOS app engineer positions.

- [@androidjobstw](https://t.me/androidjobstw){:target="_blank"}: Focused on Android job openings and Android engineer positions.

- [@flutterjobstw](https://t.me/flutterjobstw){:target="_blank"}: Dedicated to Flutter job openings and cross-platform Flutter engineer positions.
translations.1. **Filter Criteria**: Jobs added or up:
1. **Filter Criteria**: Jobs added or updated on **YYYY-MM-DD**, with "Job category as iOS/Android/Flutter Engineer" or "Job description containing iOS/Android/Flutter keywords."

2. **🆕 Tag**: Jobs posted within the last **90 days** are marked with 🆕. No salary info means it is negotiable or not disclosed on the original site.

3. **Push Notification Time**: Sent daily between **00:00–01:00** (times vary by channel), messages are kept for **30 days** only.

4. **Sorting Logic**: Sorted by "newest to oldest job postings, highest to lowest salary, and inclusion of job-related keywords," making it easy to view the latest and best-paid options first.

5. **Platforms Included**: [104 Job Bank](https://www.104.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [1111 Job Bank](https://www.1111.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [Cake (CakeResume)](https://www.cake.me/jobs){:target="_blank"}, [LinkedIn Jobs](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/){:target="_blank"}, [Yourator](https://www.yourator.co/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.1. Install Telegram: iOS version on the:
1. Install Telegram: iOS version on the App Store, Android version on Google Play, or use the desktop/web version directly.

2. Open the corresponding link to join the Channel:

   - [@iosjobstw](https://t.me/iosjobstw){:target="_blank"}: Dedicated to iOS job openings and iOS app engineer positions.

   - [@androidjobstw](https://t.me/androidjobstw){:target="_blank"}: Focused on Android job openings and Android engineer positions.

   - [@flutterjobstw](https://t.me/flutterjobstw){:target="_blank"}: Dedicated to Flutter job openings and cross-platform Flutter engineer positions.

3. Pin Chat: Long press (or right-click) the chat in the list and select "Pin" to prevent messages from being buried by other groups.

4. Notification Settings: It is recommended to enable "Daily Summary" or at least keep the red dot alert, so you can quickly scan the list in the morning.

5. Create Favorites: When you find a job you like, quickly save it using Telegram's "Save Message" or "Forward to Personal Notes."

6. Mobile Sync: Both desktop and mobile receive updates, making it easy to fill out resumes on desktop during the day and track updates on mobile at night.

Wishing you an early offer you love. ㊗️

1. [104] XXX Co., Ltd.
   Position: iOS Staff Engineer
   Salary: NT$1,500,000 ~ $2,000,000
2. [Cake] XXX Co., Ltd.
   Position: iOS Engineer
   Salary: NT$50,000 and above
...
---
Notes:

```
translations.⚠️⚠️⚠️ **不接受任何職缺或廣告刊登，請勿私訊要求置入；也永遠不會收費、獲: ⚠️⚠️⚠️ **No job postings or advertisements accepted. Please do not message for placement requests; this service will never charge fees or receive any commercial benefits.**
translations.安裝 Telegram：iOS 版 App Store、Android 版 Go: Install Telegram: iOS version on the App Store, Android version on Google Play, or use the desktop/web version directly.
translations.建立收藏夾：看到心動的職缺，用 Telegram 的「保存訊息」或「轉傳到個人記: Create Favorites: When you find a job you like, quickly save it using Telegram's "Save Message" or "Forward to Personal Notes."
translations.建議直接把你關注的 Channel 釘選在聊天列表，開啟通知或設定「靜音但保留數: It is recommended to pin the Channels you follow in your chat list, enable notifications, or set them to "mute but keep badge count." This way, you can quickly browse the latest iOS, Android, and Flutter job openings every morning.
translations.打開對應連結加入 Channel：\n: Open the corresponding link to join the Channel:
translations.本服務僅供公益性質使用，所有職缺內容的版權皆屬原刊登網站所有。\n: This service is for non-profit use only. All job content copyrights belong to the original posting websites.
translations.標題會寫出日期、地區、平台數量，幫你快速判斷「今天有沒有 iOS/Android: The title includes the date, region, and number of platforms to help you quickly determine if there is a big surge of iOS/Android/Flutter job openings today.
translations.每一則包含平台、公司、職稱、薪資區間，點開原始連結就能看完整描述。\n: Each listing includes the platform, company, job title, and salary range. Click the original link to see the full description.
translations.每天打開 104、1111、LinkedIn、Yourator，手動篩選 iOS:
Opening 104, 1111, LinkedIn, and Yourator daily to manually filter iOS, Android, and Flutter developer jobs is time-consuming and easy to miss new opportunities.  
This free Telegram notification channel automatically organizes the latest jobs for mobile developers and sends a sorted list by "update date, salary, and keywords" to your phone every day between 00:00 and 01:00. Messages are kept for 30 days, so you won't miss great jobs even while you sleep.
translations.每天早上花 5 分鐘滑過 iOS 職缺、Android 職缺、Flutter 職: Spend 5 minutes every morning scrolling through iOS, Android, and Flutter job notifications on Telegram, and you’ve booked yourself a daily “latest top job list.” No need to open multiple job sites one by one—your phone gathers the newest mobile developer openings for you. Wishing you an early offer you love. ㊗️
translations.職缺相關資訊請以原網站公告為準，不保證無缺漏及正確性。\n: Job-related information is based on the original website announcements and is not guaranteed to be complete or accurate.
translations.若你是用人單位，請直接在求職平台發佈、更新職缺資訊。\n: If you are an employer, please post or update job openings directly on the job platforms.
translations.行動版同步：桌機與手機皆會收到，方便白天用桌機填履歷、晚上用手機追更新。\n: Mobile Sync: Both desktop and mobile receive updates, making it easy to fill out resumes on desktop during the day and track updates on mobile at night.
translations.設定通知：建議開啟「每日摘要」或至少保留紅點提示，早上掃過列表即可。\n: Notification Settings: It is recommended to enable "Daily Summary" or at least keep the red dot alert, so you can quickly scan the list in the morning.
translations.釘選聊天：在聊天列表長按（或右鍵）選「Pin」，避免訊息被其他群組淹沒。\n: Pin Chat: Long press (or right-click) the chat in the list and select "Pin" to prevent messages from being buried by other groups.
translations.🆕 表示近 90 天才出現，適合優先投遞；薪資空白則代表原站未公開或需面議。\n: 🆕 indicates the job was posted within the last 90 days and is recommended for priority application; a blank salary means it is not disclosed or negotiable on the original site.
